name: Research Atlassian for initiative context
description: Scan all Jira tickets, Confluence pages, and related documentation for the initiative. Produce a structured current status report covering scope, risks, blockers, and recommendations.
acceptance_criteria: All Jira tickets related to the initiative are catalogued
steps: Read jira-context.md for Jira key and context
Scan Jira for all related tickets
Cross-reference Jira status vs Confluence documentation
Identify similar projects and extract lessons
